actions.name: copy
actions.description: Copy one file or folder to another Dropbox path.

fromPath.description: The Dropbox source path or ID.

toPath.description: The Dropbox destination path or ID.

autorename.description: Whether Dropbox should autorename on conflict.

allowOwnershipTransfer.description: Whether ownership transfer is allowed when Dropbox supports it.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for moving or copying Dropbox content.

tag.description: The Dropbox metadata tag such as file, folder, or deleted.

anyOf.description: The Dropbox item ID when available.
The user-facing cased path when available.
The lower-cased full path when available.
The client-provided modification timestamp in ISO 8601 format when available.
The server-side modification timestamp in ISO 8601 format when available.
The Dropbox file revision when available.
The file size in bytes when available.
Whether the file can be downloaded directly.
The Dropbox content hash when available.
The shared link URL when available.
The shared link expiration timestamp in ISO 8601 format when available.
A generic JSON object returned by Dropbox.
Shared-link permission metadata when Dropbox includes it.

actions.name: download_file
actions.description: Download one Dropbox file and return its content encoded as base64.

path.description: The Dropbox file path, file ID, or revision ID to download.

fileName.description: Optional file name to use for the uploaded transit file.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for downloading a Dropbox file into transit storage.

fileId.description: The unique identifier of the downloaded Dropbox file.

name.description: The name of the downloaded Dropbox file.

mimeType.description: The MIME type used for the transit upload.

anyOf.description: The size of the downloaded file content in bytes.

contentBase64.description: The downloaded file content encoded as base64.

outputSchema.description: A Dropbox file downloaded into transit storage.

actions.name: get_current_account
actions.description: Get basic profile information for the current Dropbox account.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this action.

displayName.description: The full display name of the current user.

anyOf.description: The abbreviated display name when available.
The given name when available.
The surname when available.
The email address when available.
Whether the Dropbox account email is verified.

disabled.description: Whether the Dropbox account is disabled.

anyOf.description: The account locale when available.
The account country when available.
The Dropbox account type tag when available.
The Dropbox team ID when available.
The Dropbox team name when available.

orderBy.description: How Dropbox should order search results.

mode.description: How Dropbox should handle conflicts at the destination path.

autorename.description: Whether Dropbox should autorename on conflict when supported by the mode.

clientModified.description: Optional client-side modification timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

mute.description: Whether the upload should avoid client-side user notifications.

strictConflict.description: Whether Dropbox should use stricter conflict detection.

contentHash.description: Optional Dropbox content hash for integrity verification.
